phase_history.key_outcome: Opt-in Discord embeds CR; scope=tiny; main trap = stable color hash (not builtin hash())
9 ACs (AC-V4-001-001..008 incl. 002b/008a), 7 BRs, 1 INT; spec-auditor PASS; openspec validate PASS
6 ADRs, 0 endpoints (CLI, no openapi), 9 tasks; main trap = hashlib color + code-point limits + payload-parameterized POST

phase_history.note: GO — 0 Critical/High; 1 Low bug (test gap, AC-V4-001-008 config bool-trap untested; impl correct); all ACs verified; 681 tests pass; coverage 95%

active_concerns: Color MUST use hashlib (stable), not builtin hash()
Embed limits are code points not bytes: <=10 embeds/request, <=4096 chars/description
deliver() only receives content:str — embed conversion parses Markdown in-adapter; no osspulse.render import
Embed POST must reuse status/type-only error message — webhook URL never leaked (T1)

terminology.embed: Discord rich card {title, description, color, footer.text}; max 10/request, description ≤4096 code points
terminology.use_embeds: [discord] opt-in bool config, default false; strict bool-trap validated at load
terminology.stable color: hashlib(repo_slug) % palette — deterministic across runs, unlike builtin hash()
